# mailgun_ip_allowlist (Data Source)

Retrieves all IP allowlist entries for the Mailgun account. IP allowlisting restricts API key and SMTP credential usage to specific IP addresses.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `entries` (Attributes List) List of IP allowlist entries. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--entries))
- `id` (String) The unique identifier for this data source.

<a id="nestedatt--entries"></a>
### Nested Schema for `entries`

Read-Only:

- `address` (String) The IP address or CIDR range that is allowlisted.
- `description` (String) The description of the IP allowlist entry.
